raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es liſſchu tew arridsan
par Tuſmibu un par Neewatcha-
nu ſtarp teem Paganeem/ kas
apkahrt tew irr/ preeſch to wiſ-
fu Azzim/ kas tezzen eet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tu buhſi par Aptmeek-
li un Apmehtſchanu/ Pamah-
zitſchanu un Iſtrubſſchanu teem
Paganeem/ kas apkahrt tew irr/
kad es Sohdibas pahr tew iſlat-
dischu eekſch Duſmibas un Bahr-
sbas / un zaur brecfinigahm
Sohdibahn/ es tas KUNGS
eſmu to runnajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad es tahs niknas Bul-
tas ta Badda prett teem iſtuḥ-
tiſchu/ kas par Nomaitſtſchanu
buhs/ ko es iſtuhtſchu juhs no-
maitaht / tad wairotschu es to
Baddu pahr jums/ un atzem-
schu jums to Maiſes Padobun.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir Baddu un kauns
Swehrus fuhtitschu es pahr
jums/ tee aplaupihs tew tohs
Behrnus/ ir Mehris un Affins
ees tawa Starpâ apkahrt / un
es weddischu pahr tew to Soh-
binn/ Es tas KUNGS eſmu to
runnajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta VI. Nodalla.
Ezekiels bahrgi beedina/ ka wiṣai tai Semmei
fawas Elfadeewibas pehz buhs iſpohtitai
tavt: 6. Un ka tomehr wehlzitti taps usturre,
ti: 8. Un tas tohp no ta Praweeta ar Nostam,
ſchanabm un Waimannabm apſtiprahts:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N ta KUNga Wahrs
notikke us man / kas
fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tu Zilweka Behrns/ gre-
tatu Waigu prett Israeta Ra-
neem/ un fluddina pretti teem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un faſſti: Juhs Israē-
Ralmi / klausajt to Wahrdu
Kunga KURGA/ ta faſka ta
Kungs KUNGS us teem Ra-
neem un Pakalneem / us u-
pehm un Eeletjahm. Reds/
weddu pahr jums to Sohbin-
un tamaitſchu juhsſus Augst-
mus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir juhsu Altari taps ni-
pohſiti/ un juhtu Deetwekti ni-
lausiti / un es nogabſischu ju-
ſus Eewainotus preeſch juhsſe-
Suhou-Deetweem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir es nodohſchu tahs ni-
mirrutchas Meeſas to Israē-
Behruu winno Suhou-Deen-
Preeſschā / un kaſſſchu juhs-
Kaulus apkahrt juhsſem Alt-
reem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiſſas juhsu Mahi-
Weetās taps tee Pilſfahti po-
ſiti/ un tee Augstumi par Tu-
nibahm/ tadeht ka juhsſem Alt-
reem buhs pohſā un weent-
teem buht/ un juhsu Suhō-
Deewi taps falausiti/ un mit-
fees/ un juhsas Bildeß taps ni-
zirstas/ un juhsu Darbi taps
Deldeti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un juhsu Widou guſſe-
tee Noſauzee/ ka juhs fajuhta-
ka es tas KUNGS eſmu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tomehr es atlizzinaſe-
(Rahdus/) ka jums palek / ta-
tam Sohbinam iſmuhe sta-
te
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
